issue_summary: Restored formatting interfaces to provide same functionality as v0.95.
javadoc_before:
/** * Appends another formatter. *

* The formatter must extend DateTimeFormatterProvider. * This is an internal class, which all supplied format classes extend. * * @param formatter the formatter to add * @return this DateTimeFormatterBuilder * @throws IllegalArgumentException if formatter is null or of an invalid type */
javadoc_after:
/**
     * Appends another formatter.
     *
     * @param formatter  the formatter to add
     * @return this DateTimeFormatterBuilder
     * @throws IllegalArgumentException if formatter is null or of an invalid type
     */
